allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json nb = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for cell in nb[''cells'']: if ''source'' in cell and isinstance\(cell[''source''], list\): for i, line in enumerate\(cell[''source'']\): if ''!python practice/main.py'' in line: cell[''source''][i] = line.replace\(''!python practice/main.py'', ''!python -m practice.main''\) elif ''!$PYTHON -m practice.main'' in line: cell[''source''][i] = line.replace\(''!$PYTHON -m practice.main'', ''!python -m practice.main''\) print\(json.dumps\(nb, indent=1\)\) ")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Adapt pipeline for new 1s-sampling data \(delay=2s, 1min accident\)

- Update window_size 6→3, stride 2→1 for 1s sampling \(was 0.5s\)
- Fix CNN model to support small window_size \(conditional MaxPooling\)
- Update chunk_size and defaults across inference scripts
- Add preprocessing pipeline files \(scaler, feature_transformer, metadata\)
- Remove obsolete dataloader_runs.py \(merged into dataloader.py\)
- Update .gitignore for .claude/ and model artifacts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit --amend -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Adapt pipeline for new 1s-sampling data \(delay=2s, 1min accident\)

- Update window_size 6→3, stride 2→1 for 1s sampling \(was 0.5s\)
- Fix CNN model to support small window_size \(conditional MaxPooling\)
- Update chunk_size and defaults across inference scripts
- Add preprocessing pipeline files \(scaler, feature_transformer, metadata\)
- Remove obsolete dataloader_runs.py \(merged into dataloader.py\)
- Update .gitignore for .claude/ and model artifacts
EOF
\)")
